scripts.lint: eslint app components lib scripts next.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs eslint.config.mjs
scripts.test: sh -c 'if [ ! -f .next/BUILD_ID ]; then npm run build; fi && npm run test:integration-gate && npm run test:orchestration-readiness && npm run test:security && npm run test:load-backpressure && npm run test:visual-regression && node ./scripts/smoke-shell-contract.mjs'
scripts.test:load-backpressure: sh -c 'npx vitest run app/api/control/orchestration/batches/route.test.ts -t "load/backpressure" --testTimeout 120000 && cd ../../../../services/execution-kernel && go test ./internal/service -run TestLoadBackpressureRejectsLeaseBurstAndPersistsQueueState -count=1'
scripts.test:delivery-manifests: npx vitest run lib/server/orchestration/artifacts.test.ts -t "delivery manifest golden fixtures"
scripts.external-delivery:vercel-discover: sh -c 'ENV_FILE=${FOUNDEROS_EXTERNAL_DELIVERY_ENV_FILE:-../../../../.env.external-delivery-staging}; if [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then set -a; . "$ENV_FILE"; set +a; fi; node ./scripts/external-delivery-vercel-discover.mjs'
scripts.external-delivery:preflight: sh -c 'ENV_FILE=${FOUNDEROS_EXTERNAL_DELIVERY_ENV_FILE:-../../../../.env.external-delivery-staging}; if [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then set -a; . "$ENV_FILE"; set +a; fi; node ./scripts/external-delivery-preflight.mjs'
scripts.test:external-delivery-smoke: sh -c 'ENV_FILE=${FOUNDEROS_EXTERNAL_DELIVERY_ENV_FILE:-../../../../.env.external-delivery-staging}; if [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then set -a; . "$ENV_FILE"; set +a; fi; node ./scripts/external-delivery-smoke.mjs'
